name: My cancer showed up years after work chemicals - can I still claim?
description: Yes, file when diagnosed; prove work link[2].

mainEntity.name: My cancer showed up years after work chemicals - can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, file when diagnosed; prove work link[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, for occupational diseases, claims allowed when diagnosed if linked to past exposure.** Statutes extend for latency (e.g., 6 years Utah)[2][6]. **Key factors:** Prove dose via records, expert causation[2]. **Practical guidance:** Get oncology records tying to work chemicals, file promptly. Attorney handles latency issues. **Delayed onset common in toxics.**
